channel.title: Biag ni Lam-ang on Maharlikanism
channel.description: Recent content in Biag ni Lam-ang on Maharlikanism

item.title: Lam-ang's Birth
item.description:
Once upon a time, a married couple got married and the woman became pregnant soon after.

During her pregnancy, she ate differnt kinds of fruits:

  • Young Tamarind
  • Kamias
  • Balimbing
  • Bamboo shoots
  • Sour Guavas
  • Suha
  • Lolokisen

She ate main dishes which she loved, such as:

item.title: Lam-ang's Birth
item.description:
Lam-ang dived into the river unaware that:

  • the crocodile had gone downstream while he went upstream
  • when he went downstream the crocodile went upstream

They soon spotted each other and began to fight.
